label: Transparent duckweed mat motif
workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a duckweed mat botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete floating plant cluster on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: An overhead irregular mat of tiny duckweed fronds, many small round and oval lime-green leaves with natural size variation, fresh yellow-green highlights, subtle darker green undersides, and a few dark teal still-pond water gaps visible inside the mat. Botanical accuracy for duckweed, lightweight floating texture, crisp leaf edges, compact organic silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full irregular mat edge without cropping. Clean even studio lighting, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no lotus, no lily pads, no algae slime, no flowers, no insects, no fish, no pond landscape outside the mat, no container, no hand, no props, no second subject, no text, no watermark, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Duckweed light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE source board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Duckweed" / "Duckweed". The board must be a wide 4K-class design-system reference, derived from an overhead duckweed mat motif: tiny lime-green round fronds, yellow-green highlights, darker olive undersides, dark teal still-pond water gaps, and quiet pond neutrals.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Duckweed, Duckweed, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from a duckweed mat: lime green fronds, chartreuse new growth, olive shadow leaves, dark teal pond water, misty still-pond neutrals, pale reflective water film, and tiny clustered leaf texture. The board must read as duckweed in a still pond, not lotus, lily pads, algae slime, grass, or generic green SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 池, 浮草, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, lightweight status dashboard metric cards, line chart, compact bar chart, uptime/status grid, pond sensor data table, observation filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, duckweed texture swatches.
Style/medium: premium lightweight status-system design language, realistic product UI mockup, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, pale pond-surface backgrounds, lime green primary controls, dark teal focus and command surfaces, olive-green secondary states, quiet water-neutral tables, subtle tiny-leaf texture.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: lime green duckweed, chartreuse sprout highlight, olive frond shadow, dark teal pond water, pale water film, cool mist neutral, pond-silt border, deep teal ink, warning yellow-green, status red-brown from natural leaf stress.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Duckweed", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Duckweed dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Duckweed" / "Duckweed". It must feel like the same lightweight status system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the duckweed mat motif and the light-mode board language.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Duckweed, Duckweed, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the duckweed system language: lime-green frond controls, chartreuse status highlights, olive secondary states, dark teal pond-water command and sidebar surfaces, mist-water text, pond-silt borders, deep teal ink backgrounds, tiny clustered leaf texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. It must read as duckweed in a still pond, not lotus, lily pads, algae slime, grass, or generic dark SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 池, 浮草, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, lightweight status dashboard metric cards, line chart, compact bar chart, uptime/status grid, pond sensor data table, observation filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, duckweed texture swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep pond teal and ink water, raised cards in muted teal-black, mist-water foreground text, lime-green and chartreuse primary controls, olive success/active states, pale water-film focus rings, pond-silt separators, subtle duckweed-mat texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: lime green duckweed, chartreuse sprout highlight, olive frond shadow, dark teal pond water, pale water film, cool mist neutral, pond-silt border, deep teal ink, warning yellow-green, status red-brown from natural leaf stress.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Duckweed", no illegible microtext.
